retry_reason: Put operations do not fail and retrying would cause double-free or use-after-free.
contract_summary: This is a release (put) wrapper that decrements the reference count of the object passed via 'p'. The caller must ensure that 'p' points to a valid, refcounted object. After calling this function, the caller must not use the object again, as the reference count may drop to zero and trigger deallocation. This function is intended as a KFunc destructor for BPF programs, providing a safe release path.
